pages.reasonForQuarantine: Detected ASP.NET Identity, membership, or heavyweight account-control usage that the CLI cannot safely preserve in the generated compile surface.
pages.suggestedMigrationApproach: Rebuild this flow with ASP.NET Core Identity, EditForm, and app-specific authentication endpoints before restoring the page logic.

pages.reasonForQuarantine: Detected payment-provider integration code that requires manual migration and secrets-safe server orchestration.
pages.suggestedMigrationApproach: Move payment orchestration into a dedicated server-side service or API boundary, then reconnect the page once the provider SDK is re-integrated.

pages.reasonForQuarantine: Lowercase HTML elements with server IDs still require explicit server-element shims.
pages.suggestedMigrationApproach: Port the remaining server-control or lifecycle logic into BWFC-compatible components, services, or semantic patterns before re-enabling the page.
